Part.Source:
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCodFat &FilTipEms = FilTipEms &FilRNTRC = FilRNTRC Exit EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod &HojeData = serverdate()
&NewCteCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.CTE, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat) // If CteModCod = '57' // &CteNum = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.CTENUM, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat) // &CteSer = RetornaSerieNF.Udp(domParCod.CTESER, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat) // Else // &CteNum = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.CTENUMOS, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat) // &CteSer = RetornaSerieNF.Udp(domParCod.CTESEROS, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat) // EndIf
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat CteCod = &NewCteCod CteRemCod = CteRemCod CteRemRaz = CteRemRaz CteIniUfe = CteIniUfe &impCteIniUfe = CteIniUfe CteIniCidCod = CteIniCidCod CteIniCidNom = CteIniCidNom CteDesCod = CteDesCod &CteDesCod = CteDesCod do 'GetDestinatario' CteDesRaz = CteDesRaz CteDesCnpj = CteDesCnpj CteDesCpf = CteDesCpf CteDesIns = CteDesIns CteTerUfe = CteTerUfe &impCteTerUfe = CteTerUfe CteTerCidCod = CteTerCidCod CteTerCidNom = CteTerCidNom CteTomSer = CteTomSer CteTomCod = CteTomCod CteTomRaz = CteTomRaz CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA CteModCod = CteModCod CteNum = &CteNum CteSer = &CteSer CteTipSer = CteTipSer CteMod = CteMod CteindGlo = CteindGlo
If &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Normal CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Nao else CtePosPre = CtePosPre EndIf
CteFinEms = &CteFinEms
Do Case Case &CteFinEms = '1' //complemento CteTomChvCpl = &CteTomChvCpl Case &CteFinEms = '2' //anulação CteTomChvAnaOri = &CteTomChvCpl CteTomDtaEmsDec = ServerDate()
//41 1912 19182981000163 57 001 000000280 1 00000280 2 &auxCteNum = val(substr(&CteTomChvCpl,26,9) ) &Index = strSearch(CteObsGer,'ANULACAO',1) If &Index = 0 CteObsGer += ' CTE DE ANULACAO DE VALORES RELATIVO A PRESTACAO DE SERVICO DE TRASNPORTE TOMADOS POR MEIO DO CT-E, NUMERO '+trim(str(&auxCteNum))+', SERIE '+substr(&CteTomChvCpl,23,3)+', CHAVE DE ACESSO: '+trim(&CteTomChvCpl)+', EMITIDO EM '+CteDtaEms.ToFormattedString()+', NO VALOR DE R$ '+CteVlrRecSer.ToFormattedString()+', COM ERRO XXXXXXXX.' EndIf
If CteIniUfe = CteTerUfe CteCfop = '1.206' Else CteCfop = '2.206' EndIf Case &CteFinEms = '3' //Substituição CteTomChvAnaOri = &CteTomChvCpl
Otherwise CteCfop = CteCfop CteNatOpe = CteNatOpe EndCase
CteDtaEms = &CteDtaEms CteHorEms = ServerTime() CteDadAdiTra = CteDadAdiTra.ToUpper() CteDadAdiSer = CteDadAdiSer.ToUpper() CteIndRec = CteIndRec CteIndRecDes = CteIndRecDes CteLctCod = CteLctCod &CteLctCod = CteLctCod CteNcmCod = CteNcmCod CteModRodRNTRC = CteModRodRNTRC //&FilRNTRC
CteEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Pendente CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando
If &BuscaTabelaImposto = Status_SimNao_PS.NAO CteImpCst = CteImpCst CteConSplNac = CteConSplNac CteImpAliTotTri = 0 CteImpAli = CteImpAli CteImpPerRed = CteImpPerRed CteImpTriAliInss = CteImpTriAliInss CteCfop = CteCfop CteImpVlrTotTri = CteImpVlrTotTri
Else do 'GETLANCAMENTO' If &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.sts = 'S' CteCfop = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod CteImpCst = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CteImpCst CteConSplNac = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CteConSplNac CteImpAli = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt CteImpPerRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt CteImpTriAliInss = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqInss
CteIbsCST = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsCST CteIbsClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsTrib //CteIbsIndDoa //CteIbsBas CteIbsUfTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTax CteIbsUfTaxDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsUfPerDif //CteIbsUfVlrDif CteIbsUfTaxRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs CteIbsUfTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUfTaxEfe //CteIbsUfVlr CteIbsMunTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTax CteIbsMunTaxDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeIbsMunPerDif CteIbsMunTaxRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedIbs CteIbsMunTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsMunTaxEfe //CteIbsMunVlr //CteIbsMunVlrDif //CteIbsVlrTot CteCbsTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTax CteCbsTaxDif = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeCbsPerDif CteCbsTaxRed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsRedCbs CteCbsTaxEfe = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IbsUnTaxEfe //CteCbsVlrDif //CteCbsVlr CteTribRegCst = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsSit CteTribRegClassTrib = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsClassTrib CteTribRegUfTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe //CteTribRegUfVlr CteTribRegMunTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe //CteTribRegMunVlr CteTribRegUnTax = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.NfeRegCbsTaxEfe //CteTribRegUnVlr EndIf Endif
CteCarProPre = CteCarProPre.ToUpper() CteCarVlrTot = CteCarVlrTot CteCarOtrCar = CteCarOtrCar.ToUpper()
CteVlrRecSer = CteVlrRecSer CteVlrTotPreSer = CteVlrTotPreSer CteModRodRNTRC = CteModRodRNTRC CteModRodCol = CteModRodCol
CteChv = '' CteAutNumPro = '' CteArqXml = '' CteArqXmlCan = '' CteAutSts = '' CteAutNumLot = '' CteAutNumRec = '' CteAutDigVal = '' CteAutDatHorRec = '' CteAutMsg = '' CteEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Pendente CteStsImp = '' CtePosDup = CtePosDup CtePosVei = CtePosVei CtePosDocAnt = CtePosDocAnt CteAveApo = '' CteAveArq = '' CteAveCnpjSeq = '' CteAveDta.SetEmpty() CteAveNro = '' CteAveProt = '' CteAveSts = Status_NFe.Digitando endNew
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteDocTip new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat CteCod = &NewCteCod CteDocCod = CteDocCod CteDocNro = CteDocNro CteDocSer = CteDocSer CteDocChvNfe = CteDocChvNfe CteDocTipOri = CteDocTipOri CteDocDta = CteDocDta CteDocVlrTotNtf = CteDocVlrTotNtf CteDocTip = CteDocTip EndNew EndFor
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteSegCod new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat CteCod = &NewCteCod CteSegCod = CteSegCod CteSegNom = CteSegNom CteSegApl = CteSegApl CteSeqVlrCar = CteSeqVlrCar EndNew EndFor
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteCarCod new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat CteCod = &NewCteCod CteCarCod = CteCarCod CteCarUnd = CteCarUnd CteCarQtd = CteCarQtd CteCarTip = CteCarTip CtecarIns = CtecarIns EndNew EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteVeiCod new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat CteCod = &NewCteCod CteVeiCod = CteVeiCod CteVeiRen = CteVeiRen CteVeiPla = CteVeiPla CteVeiTar = CteVeiTar CteVeiCap = CteVeiCap CteVeiCap2 = CteVeiCap2 CteVeiPro = CteVeiPro CteVeiTip = CteVeiTip CteVeiTipCarr = CteVeiTipCarr CteVeiTipRod = CteVeiTipRod CteVeiUfeCod = CteVeiUfeCod CteVeiRNTRC = CteVeiRNTRC EndNew EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteColCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat CteCod = &NewCteCod CteColCod = CteColCod CteColOcc = CteColOcc CteColCnpj = CteColCnpj CteColCodInt = CteColCodInt CteColDta = CteColDta CteColIe = CteColIe CteColFon = CteColFon CteColUfe = CteColUfe EndNew EndFor For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,(CteDocAntCod) New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat CteCod = &NewCteCod CteDocAntCod = CteDocAntCod CteDocAntCnpj = CteDocAntCnpj CteDocAntCpf = CteDocAntCpf CteDocAntIns = CteDocAntIns CteDocAntUf = CteDocAntUf CteDocAntRaz = CteDocAntRaz CteDocAntChv = CteDocAntChv
EndNew EndFor
Exit EndFor
Commit
Sub 'GETLANCAMENTO' //retorna Categoria imposto padrao CTE RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, domConfSistema.TCon209_ImpostoProdutoCTE, &TCon209_ImpostoProdutoCTE) &CImpCatCod = val(&TCon209_ImpostoProdutoCTE) if &CImpCatCod.IsEmpty() prcDefinePadraoCategoriaImpostoCTE.call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &CImpCatCod) Endif
&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.Tipo = 'CTE' &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = &FilCodFat &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = &CteLctCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod = &impCteIniUfe &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod = &impCteTerUfe &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod = &ImpGruImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod = &CImpCatCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.ProCod = 0 //nao tem produto &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.IsRetornarObs = true //retornar obs prcRetornaConfiguracaoImposto_IBSCBS.Call(&sdtCadastrotabelaImpostoCbs)
&ImpCfoNom = retornaNomeCFOP.Udp(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod) &ImpCfoNom = substr(trim(&ImpCfoNom),1,60)
&ObsNom = '' for &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbsObs in &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.Observacao &ObsNom += ' '+ trim(&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbsObs.ObsNom) EndFor EndSub
Sub 'GetDestinatario' For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &CteDesCod &ImpGruImpCod = PesGruImpCod exit EndFor EndSub
